message:
feat(fwc): add lifecycle CLI command with preflight checks and state-machine queries

New `fwc lifecycle <connector>` subcommand for querying connector
lifecycle state and running preflight safety checks before mutations.

CLI interface:
- --valid-actions: show valid lifecycle transitions for current state
- --preflight --action <ACTION>: run safety check before executing a
  lifecycle mutation (enable/disable/start/stop/restart/force-stop)
- --force: override preflight blockers
- --dry-run: simulate without side effects
- Default (no flags): show current state summary with valid actions

Implementation:
- LifecycleArgs struct with connector, action, preflight, valid_actions,
  force, dry_run fields
- lifecycle_dispatch(): resolves host, catalog, connector; dispatches to
  valid-actions, preflight, or default state summary modes
- lifecycle_state_from_catalog(): maps catalog health status to
  lifecycle_mutations::LifecycleState (Disabled/Running/Failed)
- parse_lifecycle_action(): string-to-enum mapping for action names
- All responses include structured JSON with toon text, next_actions
  guidance, and proper error types (missing-host, missing-action,
  invalid-action, connector-not-found)

Tests (7):
- lifecycle_offline_reports_missing_host
- lifecycle_valid_actions_shows_state
- lifecycle_preflight_requires_action
- lifecycle_preflight_invalid_action_reports_error
- lifecycle_preflight_valid_action_returns_check
- lifecycle_default_shows_state_and_actions
- lifecycle_unknown_connector_reports_error

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
